query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnosticAssessments (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, courseId INT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT, totalQuestions INT NOT NULL, createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (courseId) REFERENCES courses(id)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnosticQuestions (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, assessmentId INT NOT NULL, questionText TEXT NOT NULL, options JSON, correctAnswer VARCHAR(255), skillArea VARCHAR(100), createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (assessmentId) REFERENCES diagnosticAssessments(id)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS diagnosticResults (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, userId INT NOT NULL, assessmentId INT NOT NULL, score INT, totalQuestions INT, percentage DECIMAL(5,2), skillGaps JSON, recommendedLessons JSON, completedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (assessmentId) REFERENCES diagnosticAssessments(id));
